claims.claim: High spectral entropy should expand pressure trend smoothing from the base 5-sample window toward the 20-sample high-entropy window without changing pressure control.
The WS layer already exposes a read-only viscosity/porosity transport review with typed fingerprint evidence for distinguishing structural movement from stasis.
The bridge reciprocity high-semantic-viscosity reflective stale window is currently fixed at 120000ms and is covered by a waiting-window test.

Raising BRIDGE_RECIPROCITY_VISCOSITY_REFLECTIVE_STALE_WINDOW_MS to 300000ms would alter live bridge reciprocity/stale cadence and should require operator approval plus V2 authority lifecycle evidence before implementation.
